home.title: House keepers Grow your business with
home.description: Discover the power of housekeeping with AIRMANAGE. Streamline, manage, and monitor housekeeping operations with ease.

hostFeatures.title: How It Works
hostFeatures.subtitle: Add your property, assign cleaners, and manage bookings from one place.
hostFeatures.createAccountDesc: Create your profile to manage your properties and teams in one place.
hostFeatures.addPropertyDesc: Add your apartment with necessary information for management and cleaning.
hostFeatures.manageListingsDesc: Easily plan and manage cleaning of your properties.
hostFeatures.assignCleanersDesc: Associate cleaners with your properties to automate cleaning tasks.

cleanerHero.title: Find High-Paying Property Cleaning Jobs
cleanerHero.description: Connect directly with property owners and Airbnb hosts in your area. Browse available turnovers, set your own rates, and build a reliable cleaning business on your own schedule.

cleanerBenefits.title: Why Cleaners Love Gestlio
cleanerBenefits.subtitle: Join thousands of cleaners who've transformed their business with our platform. Discover the tools that make cleaning work simple and profitable.

clearSchedule.title: Clear daily schedule
clearSchedule.description: View all your cleaning jobs organized by date and time. Never miss an appointment with our intuitive calendar system.

noConfusion.title: No confusion
noConfusion.description: Get detailed job instructions, property information, and client requirements all in one place. Everything you need to know.

moreJobs.title: More jobs
moreJobs.description: Connect with property owners and Airbnb hosts looking for reliable cleaners. Expand your client base and increase earnings.

easyCommunication.title: Easy communication
easyCommunication.description: Message clients directly through the app. Ask questions, send updates, and build professional relationships.

howItWorkForCleaner.title: Start Cleaning in 4 Simple Steps
howItWorkForCleaner.subtitle: Join Gestlio and start receiving cleaning jobs in minutes.

createAccount.title: Create Account
createAccount.description: Get started in minutes, Sign up and set up your cleaner profile quickly.

connectWithHosts.title: Connect with Hosts
connectWithHosts.description: Get matched with property owners, Connect with hosts who need cleaning services.

receiveTasks.title: Receive Tasks
receiveTasks.description: Start getting cleaning jobs, Get notified when new tasks are assigned to you.

completeAndGetPaid.title: Complete & Get Paid
completeAndGetPaid.description: Finish jobs and track earnings, Complete tasks, upload proof, and receive payments easily.

downloadApp.title: Interested to use App?
downloadApp.description: Download our app and start using it today!

testimonialsForCleaner.title: Trusted by hosts from all over the world
testimonialsForCleaner.subtitle: Join thousands of hosts who trust Theo to find their perfect cleaner

testimonialsForHost.title: Cleaners already making
testimonialsForHost.subtitle: Join thousands of cleaners who trust Gestlio to find their perfect job

testimonial1.name: Alex Thompson
testimonial1.description: This platform completely transformed how I follow my favorite teams. The real-time updates and community features are absolutely incredible. I've connected with so many fellow fans!

testimonial2.name: Sarah Johnson
testimonial2.description: As a cricket enthusiast, I've never found a better platform. The insights, statistics, and match analysis are top-notch. Highly recommend to all sports fans!

testimonial3.name: Michael Chen
testimonial3.description: The basketball coverage is phenomenal. Love player stats and game predictions. The mobile app makes it easy to stay updated on the go.

testimonial4.name: Emma Wilson
testimonial4.description: Finally, a platform that gives tennis the attention it deserves! Grand slam coverage is amazing, and the analysis really helps understand the game better.

testimonial5.name: David Martinez
testimonial5.description: The football community here is incredible. Great discussions, live match threads, and fantasy league integration. Makes every game day more exciting!

testimonial6.name: Lisa Anderson
testimonial6.description: Volleyball coverage has never been better! The player profiles and match highlights are fantastic. Love the beach volleyball section especially.

testimonial7.name: James Taylor
testimonial7.description: As a competitive swimmer, I appreciate the detailed coverage of swimming events. The technique analysis and race predictions are spot on.

testimonial8.name: Robert Brown
testimonial8.description: Baseball statistics and analysis are second to none. The historical data and player comparisons help me understand the game on a deeper level.

testimonial9.name: Maria Garcia
testimonial9.description: Rugby coverage is comprehensive and passionate. The international tournament analysis and player interviews are absolutely brilliant!

testimonial10.name: Thomas Lee
testimonial10.description: The golf section is exceptional. Course guides, player statistics, and tournament coverage make this a golfer's paradise. Absolutely love it!

testimonial11.name: Jennifer White
testimonial11.description: Hockey coverage is intense and detailed. Love real-time game updates and post-match analysis. The community discussions are amazing!

testimonial12.name: Christopher Moore
testimonial12.description: Boxing analysis and fight predictions are incredibly accurate. The fighter profiles and match breakdowns help me understand the sport better.
